Appearance

BlockGuard CLISystem-wide Ad Blocker & DNS Firewall

Block ads, trackers, and malware across all apps, games, and browsers. Simple, lightweight, and automatic.

Get Started
Get Free Trial
🛡️

System-wide Filtering

Blocks ads and background telemetry in all browsers, native apps, games, and OS services at the network level.

⚡

Go-Powered Speed

Written in pure Go with in-memory rules matching and local caching. Near-zero CPU and latency overhead.

🔄

Safe Auto-Recovery

Automatically detects interfaces and configures DNS on start. Automatically reverts settings and restarts resolved on stop.

📋

312,000+ Active Rules

Pre-configured with AdGuard DNS Filter and Steven Black Hosts. Easily add, update, and manage custom filter lists.

🔑

Highly Affordable

Premium ad-blocking at just $2 USD/month. Free 3-day trial key available on Signal to try before you buy!

💻

Cross-Platform

Complete native support for Linux (systemd-resolved), macOS, and Windows command prompt environments.

Released under Subscription Licensing.
